title: calophyllum angustifolium
intro: Calophyllum angustifolium is a plant species belonging to the family Calophyllaceae, commonly known as the Calophyllaceae family, which is native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia and the Pacific Islands. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its rich content of Calophyllic acid, a compound with potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calophyllum angustifolium include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often extracted to produce oils and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including skin issues and wounds.
